title: Infosys Receives Property Tax Penalty From Indore Nagar Nigam
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from Indore Nagar Nigam for collection of a penalty of INR 11,21,293 due to alleged late payment of property tax for FY2025-2026. The company stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Indore Nagar Nigam levied a total penalty of INR 11,21,293 on Infosys.
The penalty was due to alleged late payment of property tax for FY2025-2026.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty levied due to alleged late payment of property tax for FY2025-2026.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the monetary scale of the penalty.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company's stated impact assessment.

sample_questions: What penalty did Infosys receive from Indore Nagar Nigam?
Did the Indore Nagar Nigam property tax penalty have a material impact on Infosys?
processing_notes: Marked non-material because the disclosed penalty amount is small and the company explicitly stated there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities.
